Documentation for this format

Options Sets

Answer options for overview.sponsor

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-mrid-sponsor-cs#srag ("Space Radiation Analysis Group")

Answer options for overview.discipline

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-mrid-discipline-cs#radiation ("Radiation Health")

Answer options for contingency-event.type

  • Equipment malfunction - elevated readings
  • Shielding breach/damage
  • Unexpected exposure during EVA
  • Dosimeter alarm
  • Radioactive source incident
  • Other

Answer options for exposure-assessment.dose-type

  • Whole body
  • Skin/extremity
  • Eye lens
  • Mixed/uncertain

Answer options for medical-assessment.symptoms

  • Nausea
  • Fatigue
  • Skin erythema
  • Headache
  • Other

name: MR093LRadiationContingency
title: MR093L Radiation Contingency
description: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for radiation contingency events. Documents unexpected radiation events, crew response, and medical assessment.
purpose: Document radiation contingency events, crew protective response, exposure assessment, and medical evaluation.
